name: agentic-workflow-framework
description: Multi-agent orchestration conventions: orchestrator mode, 8 subagent roles, slash commands, hooks.

hooks.command: if [ -d .claude/mytasks ]; then found=0; if grep -qE '^## [0-9]{4}-' .claude/mytasks/blockers.md 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Active blockers: .claude/mytasks/blockers.md'; found=1; fi; for f in .claude/mytasks/handoffs/*.md; do [ -e "$f" ] && { echo "Open handoff: $f"; found=1; }; done; if [ "$found" -eq 0 ]; then echo 'agentic: armed'; fi; fi
